Id1.text: Born on October 17th, 1933 in British Hong Kong, William Anders would serve as a crew member on Apollo 8.

Id2.text: William Anders who was born on 17 October 1933 in British Hong Kong later served as a crew member of Apollo 8.

Id3.text: William Anders, who was born in British Hong Kong on the 17th of October 1933, crewed Apollo 8.
